content: Submitted a journal manuscript on integrating deep learning-based motion prediction with extreme value theory for crash risk estimation.
paperTitle: Integrating Deep Learning-Based Motion Prediction into Extreme Value Theory: Incorporating Motion Heterogeneity and Interaction Behavior into Crash Risk Estimation

content: Paper accepted at Transportation Research Interdisciplinary Perspectives on a novel surrogate safety metric for pedestrian potential risk evaluation.
paperTitle: Predicted Lane-based Time to Collision: A Novel Surrogate Safety Measure for Pedestrian Potential Risk Evaluation at Non-Signalized Intersections

content: Presented a lectern-session paper at Transportation Research Board Annual Meeting.
paperTitle: A Surrogate Safety Measure at Non-signalized Intersections Based on Probability Trajectory Prediction

content: Presented large-scale road network traffic speed prediction work at the 34th KKHTCNN Symposium on Civil Engineering.
paperTitle: A Comprehensive Dynamic Spatial-Temporal Deep Learning Framework for Predicting Traffic Speed based on Large-Scale Road Networks

content: Won third prize in Transportation Research Board Data Challenge 2022.
Started master program in Civil and Environmental Engineering at KAIST.
